job_summary: The Head of Clinical Research is a top executive responsible for the overall clinical research strategy, innovation, and execution within an organization.
key_responsibilities: Define and lead global clinical research strategy
Drive innovation in clinical trials (AI, decentralized trials)
Represent the organization to regulators and stakeholders
Align clinical research with business goals
skills_required: align clinical research with business goals
define and lead global clinical research strategy
drive innovation in clinical trials (ai, decentralized trials)
represent the organization to regulators and stakeholders
